---
title: "The Rev. Gilbert Vivyan Heathcote"
---

## The Rev. Gilbert Vivyan Heathcote

**Dates:** (12 July 1830-7 Feb 1890)

### Description

son of Sir William Heathcote’s first marriage

### Biography

After going into the army and rather disappointing his father, he joined the church and became Rector of West Deeping, Lincolnshire.  He married three times, and CMY described him as ‘very hardworking & <i>very</i> High Church’.

### Letters

- Letter from March 26th 1882
- Letter from Aug 7 th [1876]
- Letter from 25 September 1838

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
